title: Misatos Cross
wikitext:
[]: Misato's Cross             Quote Post by Alitarei » Thu Mar 05, 2009 12:17 pm In The End of Eva, in the last scene, you see Misato's cross nailed to a post or a tree. What do you think this means? Did she decide not to come back and did Shinji put that up there? Or did she choose to come back in the form of a tree? Or is she one her way back? Give some insight, if you will.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Mar 05, 2009 12:28 pm Shinji probably nailed it there in memorium of Misato and everyone else, since he was the first person to get back. He probably gave up expecting everyone to show up until he saw Asuka, but that doesn't mean they won't.

[]:             Quote Post by Alitarei » Thu Mar 05, 2009 12:40 pm Yeah, that's a good one, and very likely, I think. Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Thu Mar 05, 2009 12:55 pm Personally, I think it just appeared there after third impact occured (was botched/whatever). Shinji shaped the world in the way of everything returning to normal, right? Who's to say that he didn't toss in a little grave marker for Misato to appear on the side?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Mar 05, 2009 1:26 pm If you're willing to skim through it and read the relevant bits (concerning Misato's cross), this thread explains it all: http://www.evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=2270 tldr: Shinji had Misato's cross the whole time, it's in his hand as he leaves the ocean. There was some period of time after he had re-embodied before anyone else (namely Asuka) showed up. During this time, he had lost hope that anyone was going to return so he erected grave markers for the people he knew (the erected wooden sticks). The one with the cross nailed to it was Misato's grave marker.

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Thu Mar 05, 2009 2:57 pm Strange that it didn't fall into the depths when he tanged.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Mar 05, 2009 3:18 pm He tanged in the entry plug, and was reformed there again before he left it... cross didn't have far to go. Being stuck in the plug the whole time may have been what kept him from being lost in complementation.

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Thu Mar 05, 2009 3:19 pm Although humans caught up in the mix CAN return to their own bodies, as demonstrated by Asuka et al. Point taken with the cross.

[]:             Quote Post by Alitarei » Thu Mar 05, 2009 4:24 pm Hmm, I could have sworn there was a part where Shinji let it go and it was floating out of his hand.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 05, 2009 4:31 pm Alitarei wrote: Hmm, I could have sworn there was a part where Shinji let it go and it was floating out of his hand.

[]:             Quote Post by Twsa'teotu » Thu Mar 05, 2009 8:23 pm somehow, time passes between when Shinji returns to life, and when Asuka re-appears....but what I don't get is why Shinji is waking up on the beach; maybe he just fell asleep then found Asuka there, Eve-style?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Mar 05, 2009 9:47 pm Shinji was either spacing out (note the look on his face throughout the final scene) when Asuka floated to shore (similar to how Shinji had to when he and Yui part ways) or asleep. Considering Shinji and Asuka to be Adam and Eve is simply false because the others ARE able to reform their bodies provided they choose to.

[]:             Quote Post by henna » Thu Mar 05, 2009 11:23 pm The Adam/Eve symbolism could apply to the two of them alone however, sort of the two of them having their own Genesis with each other. It's a bit of a stretch, but it sort of works :P

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Mar 06, 2009 2:25 am If Shinji woke up with a freshly stitched side and a missing rib, maybe I'd buy that theory.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Mar 06, 2009 12:00 pm No way in hell are those two having any children, much less multiple. Humanity is BONED if it's down to Shinji and Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Fri Mar 06, 2009 12:09 pm AuraTwilight wrote: No way in hell are those two having any children, much less multiple. Humanity is BONED if it's down to Shinji and Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Mar 06, 2009 2:18 pm @henna as per http://www.stevegilham.com/nge/second.html#adamandeve you mean? But also http://www.evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?p=61915#61915

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 06, 2009 3:35 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Shinji was either spacing out (note the look on his face throughout the final scene) when Asuka floated to shore (similar to how Shinji had to when he and Yui part ways) or asleep.

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Fri Mar 06, 2009 6:55 pm Time and Tide, love.

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Fri Mar 06, 2009 7:38 pm It'd be nice if he constructed gravemarkers, but aren't those just the telephone poles (more visual lexicon?) you see throughout the series?
